items.name: Saw Wings
items.description:
These wings are crafted of real saws! The method was quite simple, run down to a local hobby or depot store, buy a ton of saws, melt them down into wing molds, and BOOM. Saw Wings!

Part of my accessory series: My Take On Build To Survive The Zombies by DANGERTIM112.

Main Accessory: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/100305029500245/Saw-Zombie-Head

items.name: [BOY] Blocky Y2K Shorts + Black Sneakers
items.description:
Rock a clean Y2K street look with these blocky layered shorts, built to give your avatar that bold, classic Roblox silhouette 🧍‍♂️🔥 The structured fit keeps things sharp and stylish while still feeling casual and easy to wear. Built right into the shorts are sleek black shoes, giving the whole piece a finished, ready-to-go vibe 👟🖤

The shoes add a solid, grounded feel that balances perfectly with the chunky shorts design, making your outfit look put-together from top to bottom 😎✨ Whether you’re chilling with friends, roleplaying, or showing off your fit in-game, this combo delivers effortless style without overdoing it 💥

Perfect for streetwear, Y2K-inspired outfits, and everyday looks — simple, confident, and made to stand out
